promoted_development_policy.router: Select cases where all eleven base prompts return distinct answers, capped at eight by lowest mean confidence then case_id.
promoted_development_policy.override: Replace the extended fifteen-prompt plurality on routed cases with deterministic plurality across the three deep prompts.

diagnosis: Single-case phase-congruence reasoning was the largest generation improvement, solving five of seven maximally disputed cases.
Several distinct three-prompt deep subsets raised the complete development system to 20/24, reducing dependence on a unique post-hoc combination.
The promoted trio includes one broad interwoven/lag solver, one phase-congruence solver, and one recurrence/procedure solver for better structural coverage.
The 83.3% score is open development only. The full router, trio, cap, and unconditional deep-plurality override must be frozen before fresh calls.
